steps.title: Separate a complex list
steps.content: After These included, the sentence lists Celtic art elements: intricate patterns that often held symbolic significance, depictions of animals, and inlaid enamel accents. Because the list contains internal commas, stronger separators keep the items clear.

steps.title: Keep the list connected
steps.content: Choice A wrongly ends the sentence mid-list. Choice B uses a colon where the list is already underway. Choice D uses only a comma, making the complex series harder to parse. The remaining choice uses a semicolon between list elements. The answer is C.
